name: Mother Sarah Howard-Jones
bio:
Thank you for visiting our website - you are most welcome here and do get in touch to find out more. I am delighted to have been vicar of St Barnabas Ealing since June 2024, and have loved getting to know the area and its people. If you and I haven't met yet, please do be in touch with me; I will be pleased to meet you.

I live in the vicarage close to the church in Pitshanger with Julian, my two teenagers and our cat Minou. As an orchestral violinist I am pleased to play with one of the Ealing ensembles, so many of whom are regularly part of the vibrant musical life of St Barnabas we rejoice in.

I enjoy getting out and sharing in your events of all kinds in our locality, whether they be of any faith or none, believing in the restorative gifts of community and social interaction. Drop me an email to let me know.
